data.name: UnexpectedServerError
data.value: Unexpected server error

data.name: UnexpectedErrorProcessingRequest
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: InvalidRequest
data.value: The request contains invalid values.

data.name: ResourceNotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: ResourceConflict
data.value: The request conflicts with the current resource state.

data.name: InvalidOrganizationRequest
data.value: The organization request contains invalid values.

data.name: OrganizationContactEmailDuplicated
data.value: Organization contact email is already registered.

data.name: OrganizationTaxIdDuplicated
data.value: Organization tax identifier is already registered.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingOrganization
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the organization.

data.name: InvalidOrganizationSignUpRequest
data.value: The organization sign-up request is invalid.

data.name: UserEmailDuplicated
data.value: User email is already registered.

data.name: InitialRoleNotFound
data.value: Initial sign-up role is missing.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingOrganizationSignUp
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while signing up the organization.

data.name: InvalidUserRequest
data.value: The user request is invalid.

data.name: OrganizationNotFound
data.value: Organization was not found.

data.name: UserNotFound
data.value: User was not found.

data.name: RoleNotFound
data.value: Role was not found.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingUser
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the user.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorAssigningUserRole
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while assigning the user role.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingUsers
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting users.

data.name: InvalidLocationRequest
data.value: The location request is invalid.

data.name: LocationNameDuplicated
data.value: Location name already exists in this organization.

data.name: LocationNotFound
data.value: Location was not found.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingLocation
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the location.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorUpdatingLocation
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the location.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingLocations
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting locations.

data.name: InvalidGatewayRequest
data.value: The gateway request is invalid.

data.name: GatewayUuidDuplicated
data.value: Gateway UUID already exists in this organization.

data.name: GatewayNotFound
data.value: Gateway was not found.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingGateway
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the gateway.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorUpdatingGateway
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the gateway.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingGateways
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting gateways.

data.name: AssetNotFound
data.value: Asset was not found.

data.name: InvalidMaintenanceScheduleRequest
data.value: The maintenance schedule request is invalid.

data.name: MaintenanceScheduleNotFound
data.value: Maintenance schedule was not found.

data.name: MaintenanceScheduleDuplicateActive
data.value: The asset already has an active maintenance schedule.

data.name: MaintenanceScheduleInvalidTransition
data.value: The requested status transition is not allowed.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingMaintenanceSchedule
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the maintenance schedule.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorUpdatingMaintenanceSchedule
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the maintenance schedule.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingMaintenanceSchedules
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting maintenance schedules.

data.name: InvalidTechnicalServiceRequestRequest
data.value: The technical service request contains invalid values.

data.name: TechnicalServiceRequestNotFound
data.value: Technical service request was not found.

data.name: TechnicalServiceRequestInvalidTransition
data.value: The requested status transition is not allowed.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingTechnicalServiceRequest
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the technical service request.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorUpdatingTechnicalServiceRequest
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the technical service request.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingTechnicalServiceRequests
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting technical service requests.

data.name: InvalidIncidentRequest
data.value: The incident request is invalid.

data.name: IncidentNotFound
data.value: Incident was not found.

data.name: IncidentAlreadyAcknowledged
data.value: The incident is already acknowledged.

data.name: IncidentAlreadyResolved
data.value: The incident is already resolved.

data.name: InvalidIncidentLifecycleTransition
data.value: The requested incident lifecycle transition is not allowed.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingIncident
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the incident.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorAcknowledgingIncident
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while acknowledging the incident.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorResolvingIncident
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while resolving the incident.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingIncidents
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting incidents.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingNotifications
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting notifications.
